nodes.label: Sanad Scanner Full Screenshot
nodes.summary: Full-page screenshot of the Sanad legal app showing the 'Today' (اليوم) daily priorities dashboard. Displays a personalized Arabic greeting, a sidebar navigation with role-switching (محامي/طالب), and five prioritized tasks for the day. Bottom bar confirms PWA installation and Saudi legal market positioning.

properties.target_market: Saudi Arabia lawyers and small businesses

nodes.label: Today / Daily Priorities View
nodes.summary: The 'Today' screen (اليوم) in Sanad. Shows a prioritized task list called أولويات اليوم (Today's Priorities) with AI-curated or manually set items: NDA follow-up, hearing confirmation, labor law review, hearing file preparation, and VAT declaration submission. Includes a 'Start Focus' CTA to enter deep work mode.

properties.task_1: متابعة توقيع اتفاقية السرية – NDA sent 5 days ago
properties.task_2: تأكيد موعد الجلسة – Call court for Al-Sulaiman hearing
properties.task_3: مراجعة تحديث قانون العمل – New remote work decree
properties.task_4: تجهيز ملف الجلسة – Al-Sulaiman estate, collect Sukuk certificates
properties.task_5: تقديم إقرار ضريبة القيمة المضافة – Submit VAT via Zakat portal before deadline

nodes.label: Sanad Sidebar Navigation
nodes.summary: Right-side RTL navigation sidebar listing all major sections of the Sanad app. Contains: اليوم (Today), لوحة التحكم (Dashboard), العملاء (Clients), لوحة القضايا (Cases Board), المستندات (Documents), ماسح المستندات (Document Scanner), الفواتير (Invoices), الامتثال (Compliance, badge:4), المهام (Tasks, badge:9), العمل العميق (Deep Work), التقويم (Calendar).

nodes.label: Role Switcher (محامي / طالب)
nodes.summary: Top navigation pill toggle allowing switching between محامي (Lawyer) and طالب (Student) roles. Both roles are visible; محامي is currently active. Also contains icons for dark mode, EN/AR language toggle, refresh, and search.

nodes.label: PWA & Local Server Support
nodes.summary: The app is installed as a PWA and runs optimized on a local (home) server. Status bar text reads 'محسّن للخادم المنزلي · PWA مُفعَّل'. An in-app notification confirms PWA installation and directs the user to the desktop shortcut for daily access.

properties.notification_text: مثبت كتطبيق PWA. اذهب على سطح المكتب للوصول اليومي.

nodes.label: ScannerView Component
nodes.summary: The ScannerView (ماسح المستندات) is one of the navigable sections in the Sanad sidebar. This screenshot's filename references it, though the active view shown is the Today/Priorities dashboard.

nodes.label: DeepWorkView Component
nodes.summary: Deep Work (العمل العميق) is accessible from the sidebar. The 'ابدأ تركيز (Start Focus)' CTA on the Today screen likely navigates to or activates the DeepWorkView.
